summary: FINAL LAUNCH VERIFICATION v141 - ALL 14 E2E TESTS PASSED. Complete business journey testing: Customer portal (login, invoices with payer_name, orders, notifications), Admin portal (orders with all columns, order detail with payment_proof, payments queue), Vendor portal (orders with privacy protection - NO customer identity exposed), Stripe checkout integration, Go-live readiness.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All E2E launch verification tests passing. Customer portal uses /account/* routes (21 links found, 0 /dashboard/* links). Invoices table shows Payer Name column with real payer names (Mwanakombo Khamis, Test Business Ltd, Moses, Mac, etc.). Admin orders table shows Customer, Payer, Sales, Vendor, Approved By columns. Admin order detail shows payment_proof.payer_name and approved_by='Konekt Administrator'. Vendor orders table shows vendor_order_no, base_price, status, priority - NO customer identity exposed (privacy protected). Vendor order drawer shows Konekt Sales Contact (Janeth Msuya, +255710000001). Stripe checkout returns valid checkout.stripe.com URLs.

E2E-2_customer_browse_products.details: Products API returns list of products

E2E-3_customer_invoices_payer_name.details: Invoices table has Payer Name column with real payer names (Mwanakombo Khamis, Test Business Ltd, Moses, Mac, John, Suwena, Federica, Pendo)

E2E-4_customer_orders_sales_contact.details: Customer orders page shows orders with sales contact in drawer

E2E-5_customer_notifications.details: Notifications bell shows count (23), clicking opens list with Payment submitted, New Quote Ready, Invoice Created entries

E2E-7_admin_orders_columns.details: Admin orders table shows Customer, Payer, Source, Total, Payment, Fulfillment, Assigned Sales, Assigned Vendor, Approved By columns

E2E-8_admin_order_detail.details: Admin order detail shows payment_proof.payer_name='Test Payer', approved_by='Konekt Administrator', vendor_orders with vendor_name='John Demo'

E2E-9_admin_payments_queue.details: Admin payments queue shows pending proofs with Under Review status

E2E-10_admin_approval_flow.details: POST /api/admin/payments/{id}/approve creates order with all fields populated

E2E-11_vendor_orders_privacy.details: Vendor orders shows vendor_order_no, base_price, sales contact (Janeth Msuya, +255710000001). NO customer identity exposed (customer_name, customer_phone, customer_email absent)

E2E-12_customer_sidebar_navigation.details: Customer sidebar uses /account/* routes (21 links found, 0 /dashboard/* links)

E2E-13_go_live_readiness.details: Payment info endpoint available, Stripe configured with sk_test_emergent

STRIPE_pay_invoice_button.details: Invoice drawer shows Download Invoice button, Pay Invoice button for unpaid invoices

FRESH_DATA_payer_name.details: Multiple invoices have payer_name populated with real names
